===Etymology 1===
{{zh-forms|alt=獱}}
{{zh-ref|Peiros & Starostin (1996)}} (apud {{zh-ref|Schuessler, 2007}}) compares this to {{cog|my|ဖျံ||otter}}. STEDT provisionally reconstructs {{cog|tbq-pro|*phyam||otter}} and compares the Chinese and Burmese words to {{cog|ckh|tr=phaing}} and {{cog|rmz|tr=phaing}}.

====Definitions====
{{head|zh|hanzi}}

# [[otter]] <!--- 《說文》獺屬。从犬，扁聲。或作獱。 ---->
#* {{zh-x|夫{fú} 畜 池-魚 者 必 去 猵{biān}-獺，養 禽獸 者 必 去 豺狼，又 況 治 人 乎！|One who raises fish in ponds needs to fend off '''otters'''; one who rears fowls and livestock needs to fend off dholes and wolves; let alone more to govern people!|CL|ref=Huainanzi}}
